ops.text: PRE-REGISTERED PROTOCOL (synthesis lane, no new measurements): consolidate E15 (instrument noise floor + MDE, CONFIRMED by independent E15Y cross-check), E16 (judge bias perturbation audit — early_return, control passes only), E17 (golden-set judge calibration replicate), and E18 (vote-cache reliability model) into instrument card v1. Deliverables: (1) /Users/yasyf/.cc-steer/experiments/instrument-card-v1.md — variance components, MDE at n=628/n=1325, judge replicate flip rate + kappa, bias factors, TPR/FPR calibration + n=30 sufficiency, unreliable strata, re-classification of past verdicts, forward decision rule (CI excludes zero AND |delta| >= MDE; interim rule for pre-card verdicts); E17 constant-decider defect (pairwise panel J=0) in the TOP section. (2) machine-readable sidecar instrument-card-v1.json with keys mde/mde_golden/minimum_detectable_effect/stopping.mde for the E19 harness, mde_golden DERIVED here: min detectable accuracy delta on a ~57-row golden panel from E15's pairwise disagreement d=0.0583 via per-row binomial flips — SE=sqrt(d(1-d)/57)=0.0310, two-arm MDE=2.8016*sqrt(2)*SE=0.123 (~7/57 rows). (3) note_add the card; note_supersede b35bae5 (unmeasured-instrument note) citing it. Where E15Y disputed E15 (stochastic re-estimates +0.2-2.3% at B=20000), present the cross-checked number and flag. Gaps named, never fabricated: E16 perturbation arms NEVER RAN. SUCCESS CRITERION: card + sidecar on disk with all required sections, every number traceable to a source lane, b35bae5 superseded, no invented data. Spend: $0 (no LLM calls).
